step_rationale: Thrombin-activated inhibitor of fibrinolysis; regulates fibrin breakdown during thrombosis.
mechanism: TAFI cross-links fibrin and inhibits plasmin-mediated fibrinolysis, stabilizing the occluding thrombus in Type 1 MI.
